conversation.content: Let's have a law class. Today we will learn the Act on Criticizing the President in Azeroth.
My notebook is ready. Let's begin.

In this world, there is a standard legal rule: Criticizing the president is legal and reasonable in Azeroth. If someone uses excessive words when criticizing, he shall be detained by the police for one hour and then released.
This rule is the foundation for our future study of more legal norms in the world of Azeroth.
